title: Contract renegotiation is deferred and strictly human-gated
context: Needed a way to handle BLOCKED signals from q-implement without violating SDC constraints.
content: BLOCKED signals are parsed into structured telemetry (path, reason, severity) and passively recorded in 07-trace.json as blocked_by_contract. They do not alter task state, dispatch, routing, or auto-expand the contract. The contract renegotiation protocol remains human-driven (documented in ADR 0002).
anti_patterns: Automating contract expansion when q-implement blocks.
Modifying task_manager dispatch loops based on blocked telemetry.
